titleStmt.title: SII 9.528: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 528. (A.R. No. 194 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT HAVINAHALU-VIRAPURA, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1450, Sarvadhāri, Māgha, śu. 6 corresponding to A.D. 1529 January 15, Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the people of the village of Doṇḍavaṭe made a grant of land to Malesāṇi, son of Guṇḍapa for repairing the tank at the village. The gift is stated to have been made under the orders of Mudaṇa-Nāyaka to whom the king had given the village as an umbaḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīgaṇādhipa
taĒ namaḥ svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśā
livāhanaśakavaruṣa 1450 neya sarvadhāri
saṁvacharada māgha śu 6 lu śrīmatu śrīman
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
vīrakruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyavanāḷuttira
lu mudaṇanāyakarige Uṁbaḷiyanu pālisida doṁḍavaṭeya grāmada
gauḍa maṁgoṁḍagauṁḍara golahoṁnayanu sēnabōva ti
parasara maga �vonagoṁḍadēvanu vokalu maṟaḍi Usiku grāma
niṁbarada hoṁnaya basaviṟaḍi Elaiya bhaṁmi Elai
ya hosaura sirumaṇamulana Elaiyanu muṁtāda sa
masta prajegaḷu mudaṇanāyakara nirūpadiṁdalū guṁḍapana
maga malesāṇiyarige hākikoṭa keṟeya kaṭumānya
dasavaṁdada śāśanada kramaveṁtaṁdare naṁma doṁḍavaṭeya grā
mau nīruvari yilade grāma khilavāgiralāgi nāu Ellarū
mudaṇanāyakarige biṁnahaṁ māḍi nāvu niṁmanu voḍaṁba
ḍisida vivarau naṁma doṁḍavaṭeya grāmadalu niṁma kaiya ma
nu yiki keṟeya kaṭisidare na(ṁ)mmu seragrāma sirigeṟeya gō
vaṇagauḍa muruḍanūra hanumaṁtagauḍa yivarige naḍada kaṭumā
nyada dasavaṁda Ātanu kaṭisida keṟeya keḷage hāga naḍadu bahudu hāga
naḍisi voḍaṁbaḍisalāgi nīu naṁma
kaṁ dalu naṁma doṁḍavaṭe
yalu keṟeya keḷage haṟida
bījavari varadalu khaṁḍu
ga voṁdane Ayi lu naḍasibahu
Ā vaṁśada kaṭumānya �yo biṁnaha
māḍi niṁma makaḷa makaḷa thara baheU yida
niṁma grāmake Āvanānobanu tappi māḍidare Ātana
taṁde tāya vāraṇāsi hōhanu taṁma
Akataṁgiyarige Ā mahāpātaka
kke hōdavaru naṁma Ūra prajegaḷu Āyagāṟu
muṁtagi Āvanānobba kaṭumānyake
ḍi baṁdareU naṁma grāma biṁnahaṁ mā
ḍi �yo dasavaṁdavanu
pa �yo dasavaṁdada yede tapi
dare �yo Ūra mādāṟa makaḷu Ēṁdu hoyda śāśanada kalu
dharmavē jaya maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
kōnasamadrada keṟe .
Digital edition of SII 9.528 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
